title: Macintosh
text: Home * Hardware * Macintosh Original Macintosh [1] Macintosh , a series of personal computers (PCs) designed, developed, and marketed by Apple Inc , introduced on January 24, 1984 by Steve Jobs . It was the first mass-market personal computer featuring a graphical user interface and a mouse .
